hc2d09cd6g39abg4bb8gb869gf2d95359592f: You ever been to the Underdark?
h954aee96g82f3g47adg8220gc97dda67cfda: I was born in the Underdark, mate. An' I've got the lash-marks to show fer it.
hda79d925g3f1fg4798g89f3g8322596a2954: Yeah. An' the one thing I learned down there...
h911667cag2632g461dgb247g22c812b95c2c: ... don't matter if you're a slave or a king. Drow'll pluck out yer eyes if you look at 'em wrong.
